'''R1-T4''' was an [[R1-series astromech droid/Legends|R1-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. R1-T4 was programmed with coded information pertaining to the location of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] hidden weapon stores. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was part of a cargo shipped to [[Janelle Serap]] on [[Seikosha/Legends|Seikosha]] from [[Simms Jonndril]] sometime after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
